title: 4 Pack A4 Acrylic Document Tray – Stackable Letter Organiser, Transparent Premium Clear Filing Trays for Office, Home, School (Sturdy Design)
features: Durability and Visibility: Acrylic is known for its durability and impact resistance, making these letter trays sturdy and less prone to breakage. The transparency allows for quick identification of documents, reducing search time, while adding a modern and stylish touch to any workspace.

Stackability and No Assembly Required: With a total of 4 trays and a stackable design, the height and number of trays can be adjusted as needed. Unlike rust-prone metal trays, these require no assembly and provide a practical, space-saving solution.

Versatile Office Organization: This versatile desk tidy organiser is a 4-tier tray suitable for various environments, from offices to home workspaces. It accommodates A4 paper, iPads, documents, letters, books, invoices, and more—the ultimate solution for efficient desk tidy.

Enhanced U-Shaped Groove Design and Dust Resistance: The U-shaped groove design makes transportation and cleaning easier. Unlike wire mesh metal trays, these transparent acrylic accessories are easy to clean and rust-free, maintaining a neat appearance on your desk.

Large Capacity & Multi-Functional: Perfect as both a file organiser and general desk organiser, this 13 x 9.4 x 10.2 inch tray provides ample, sorted space for files, folders, books, tablets, and supplies. It's the simple, all-in-one solution to manage your items and maintain a clutter-free environment.
